name: German Sweet Chocolate Cream Cheese Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, melt the chocolate and margarine together until smooth.
3. Add sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
4. Fold in the flour and chopped nuts until evenly distributed.
5. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish and spread it evenly.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the brownies to cool completely before serving.
